title: CopilotAgentTestCase
description: Schema for a single evaluation test case for a Copilot Studio agent.

id.description: Unique identifier for the test case. Format: <vertical>-<agent-abbreviation>-<zero-padded-number>. Example: coffee-vc-001.

input.description: The user utterance or message sent to the agent.

expected.description: A concise description of the expected agent response or behaviour.

category.description: High-level classification of what the test case validates.

eval_set.description: The evaluation set this test case belongs to. Matches category in standard sets.

methods.description: One or more evaluation methods to apply to this test case.

keywords.description: Keywords used by keyword_match_any or keyword_match_all evaluation methods.

tags.description: Optional labels for filtering and reporting (for example, topic name, safety, pii).

notes.description: Optional free-text notes for reviewers or test maintainers.
